name: Mixtral 8x22B
metaDescription: Mixtral 8x22B (Mistral AI), released 2024-04-10 — part of the Mixtral line. 141B-total sparse MoE, Apache 2.0.
overview: Mixtral 8x22B is a large language model from Mistral AI, part of the Mixtral line. Released 2024-04-10. Legacy open-weight sparse mixture-of-experts line that put Mistral on the map.
What's notable in this version: 141B-total sparse MoE, Apache 2.0.
